preconditions: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page loads successfully in guest state
Open the Login page using the person/profile button on the Home page

testCases.title: Verify Login page opens from Home page using the person/profile button
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the application is displayed in guest state
Click the person/profile button on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page/view opens from the Home page and displays Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button in an interactive state.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after navigation from Home page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the person/profile button to open Login page
Inspect the Login page controls
testCases.expectedResult: Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters by default
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click inside the Password field
Type the password value Carwash#1
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks all entered characters and does not display the raw password text on screen.

testCases.title: Verify successful login using approved valid credentials returns user to authenticated Home state
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin in the Username field
Enter password Carwash#1 in the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page in authenticated state, replaces the person/profile button with the logged-in user name, and displays authenticated-only features.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username prevents authentication and displays login error
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invalid username invaliduser
Enter valid password Carwash#1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an observable login error message is displayed, the application remains unauthenticated, and the user stays on the Login page or in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify invalid password prevents authentication and displays login error
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter valid username krisadmin
Enter invalid password WrongPassword1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an observable login error message is displayed, the application remains unauthenticated, and the Login page remains active.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with both invalid username and invalid password is rejected
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invalid username wronguser
Enter invalid password wrongpass
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, visible error feedback is displayed, and the user is not redirected to authenticated Home state.

testCases.title: Verify required field validation when Login button is clicked with both fields empty
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave Username and Password fields empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Required field validation is displayed for Username and Password fields and authentication does not proceed.

testCases.title: Verify Username required validation when Password is entered and Username is blank
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave the Username field empty
Enter password Carwash#1 in the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible Username required validation message is displayed and login does not proceed.

testCases.title: Verify Password required validation when Username is entered and Password is blank
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin in the Username field
Leave the Password field empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible Password required validation message is displayed and login does not proceed.

testCases.title: Verify Back button on Login page returns user to Home page guest state
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click the Back button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state and the Login page is no longer displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Home button on Login page returns user to Home page guest state
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state and the Login page is closed.

testCases.title: Verify leading and trailing spaces in valid username and password are handled during login
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username with leading and trailing spaces as '  krisadmin  '
Enter password with leading and trailing spaces as '  Carwash#1  '
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles leading and trailing spaces according to business behavior, with either successful authentication after trimming valid values or visible rejection feedback while remaining unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only Username and Password values are not accepted
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter only spaces in the Username field
Enter only spaces in the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Whitespace-only values are rejected, required or invalid input validation is displayed, and the application does not authenticate the user.

testCases.title: Verify special characters in invalid credentials do not bypass authentication
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin@@
Enter password Carwash#1!!
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The invalid credential values are rejected, authentication does not occur, and an observable login failure message is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify long Username and Password input values are handled without application crash
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter an excessively long value into the Username field
Enter an excessively long value into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page remains stable, authentication is rejected for invalid long credentials, and visible feedback or validation is displayed without UI corruption.

testCases.title: Verify user remains in guest state after failed authentication attempt
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invalid username invaliduser
Enter invalid password invalidpass
Click the Login button
Navigate back to the Home page if still on Login page
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains in guest state, authenticated-user UI is not displayed, and the person/profile button remains visible instead of a logged-in user name.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated Home page displays logged-in user identity after successful login
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin
Enter password Carwash#1
Click the Login button
Observe the Home page after authentication
testCases.expectedResult: The authenticated Home page displays the logged-in user name in place of the person/profile button and exposes authenticated-only functionality.
